title: Ticket 02 - Modularization & UML

questions.prompt: In ticket 02 the key statement appears: "Classify and apply training-company modularization and UML safely in daily work." What did he say?

options.text: We should clearly understand training-company modularization and UML in daily work and implement it cleanly.

options.text: We can ignore training-company modularization and UML as long as there is no time pressure.

options.text: Align briefly, document cleanly, and make the next step clear.

options.text: Write nothing down at first and decide later by feel.
